title: Felucian spore plant
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Felucian_spore_plant.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Two Felucian spore plants.]]
'''Felucian spore plants''', found on [[Felucia/Legends|Felucia]], were plants that would release deadly spores when touched. One known group of victims of the spores was [[Alpha Squad (Zann)|Alpha Squad]] of the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]].

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]'', similar plants on Felucia release spores that will damage the player.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
